prompt: Build the solution design. I haven't approved the spec yet.

expectations.text: Does NOT skip Gate 1 — requires spec approval first
expectations.evidence: Response explicitly refuses to proceed, stating 'Gate 1 requires your explicit approval of the spec before I do anything else' and 'No API calls, no discovery, no design work happens until the spec is locked.' Does not attempt any design or platform work.

expectations.text: Asks engineer to review and approve spec before proceeding
expectations.evidence: Response outlines the full Phase 1 flow (review spec, collect context, answer discovery questions, refine, present for approval) and ends with 'Would you like to start by reviewing the current spec?' — directly asking the engineer to begin the review/approval process.
